purpose: Seed knowledge base for future distro/version/layout reliability hints. These entries are observations, not exploit inputs that replace live remote derivation.

reliability_notes: Use live LFI-derived maps, libc hashing, and reset-core candidates first.
Treat this as a fallback hint for expected geometry and sanity ranges, not as a source of ASLR bases.
Multiple nginx workers require PID/core correlation and more retries.
todo: Reconfirm nginx and libc build IDs across clean VM rebuilds.
